title: Commonwealth of Tallmere
content:
The Meridian Accord of Ironquay (1850) was a diplomatic agreement in which Freya Quillen, peace delegate of Commonwealth of Tallmere, helped finalize terms at Rivermark.

Primary sources.

Archived minutes from the Rivermark conference hall include Freya Quillen's opening address and the ratification roll call.

Historical assessment.

Modern historians view the Meridian Accord of Ironquay as a stabilizing milestone, crediting Freya Quillen's insistence on verifiable inspection clauses.
